title: Statistical Inference on Errorfully Observed Graphs
journal: Journal of Computational and Graphical Statistics
abstract: In many applications the existence of an edge between two vertices is based on some imperfect assessment. We investigate the quantity/quality tradeoff for errorful observations, studying the stochastic blockmodel and applying it to the C. elegans connectome.
notes: Addresses the fundamental issue that connectome edges are measured with error.
